headline: What Moody's (MCO)'s Broad Russell Value Index Inclusion Means For Shareholders
summary: In late June 2026, Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO) was added to multiple Russell value-oriented benchmarks, including the Russell 3000 Value, Russell 1000 Value, Russell 1000 Value-Defensive, Russell Top 200 Value, and Russell 3000E Value indices following the annual reconstitution. This broad inclusion across major Russell value indices may reshape how large institutional investors and index-tracking funds view Moody's role in value-focused portfolios. Next, we'll examine how Moody's broad...

headline: Moody's (MCO) Stock Trades At A Premium On Fair Value And Earnings
summary: Moody's stock has delivered a 43.2% gain over the past three years, yet both its intrinsic value estimate from the Excess Returns model and its market multiples currently point to the shares trading at a premium, raising questions about how much upside is left in the current price. Over the last three years, Moody's has returned 43.2%, which puts recent share performance well ahead of its shorter term returns. Expansion into broader analytics and AI powered data workflows can support higher...

headline: Jersey City Shadowed by 15% Tax Hike as Boomtown Faces Reckoning
